title: Vicloon Kids Rain Coat for Girls and Boys, Portable Raincoat Rain Poncho Kids Waterproof with Hoods and Sleeves, Rain Resistant Poncho for Camping, Emergency Situations, Travel
features: 🌦🌧ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY AND HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL—— kids raincoat is made of 100% environmentally friendly high-quality EVA, non-toxic, odorless, waterproof, lightweight, breathable, extremely durable, not easy to scratch and damage, keep your kids dry and comfortable in rainy days

🌦🌧EASY TO CLEAN AND REUSABLE——Kids raincoats are eco-friendly and reusable, easy to clean, if stained, just clean with a damp cloth and put in a ventilated place; they can be easily dried and refolded for repeated use

🌦🌧PERFECT SIZE——our children's poncho is made of 0.15mm thick EVA waterproof fabric, the size is about 110*55cm (hat length 35CM, body length 85CM, sleeve length 52CM, hem width about 55cm) is very suitable for children with a height of 110-150cm child

🌦🌧QUALITY GUARANTEE——Our raincoat is easy to put on and take off with convenient snap buttons and drawstrings on both sides, and has a snug fit for all-round protection, keeping you dry in the rain; the inflatable hood keeps the rain out without blocking your view , the loose back leaves room for a child's backpack

🌦🌧MULTIFUNCTIONAL USE——100% waterproof, transparent rain cape, perfect for various outdoor activities, including theme parks, concerts, water rides, amusement parks, fishing, hiking, camping, travel, stadiums, etc.
